word: H7872 - שֵׂיבָה - sêybâh - say-baw' - Gray hairs

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂיבה

Transliteration: śêybâh

Phonetic: say-baw'

BDB Definition:

  1. age, gray hair, hoary head, old age
    1. gray hair, hoary head
    2. old age

Origin: from H7869

TWOT entry: 2253b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
